description: Baseline: CPU composeAllValueLayers, 570ms/tick mean, 1200×1200 grid, 8 zones, marketTown archetype
GPU (Dawn/WebGPU): composeAllValueLayers via compute shader — 48.8ms vs 571ms CPU, 11.7× speedup
GPU session: persistent buffers + partial uploads (only dynamic influence layers re-uploaded per tick) — 13ms mean vs 48ms per-call, 43× vs CPU baseline
